story: After a fight at home, Lynette slipped Duncan the marionette and Buck the plastic pony into a pillowcase and escaped to the town library. She hid in the children’s stacks and read The Red Pony for what felt like minutes but became hours. The librarian had already called her dad. On the drive from the garage, Cal kept telling himself not to blow up this time—just bring Lynette home safe and talk. Downstairs, Lynette heard his voice asking if anyone had seen her. She peeked.
implausible_knowledge: Cal kept telling himself not to blow up this time—just bring Lynette home safe and talk
question: When Lynette hears her father in the children’s section and sees him pass her aisle, what will she do?
answer_with_knowledge: Step out, call to him, and let him take her home.
